title: Overall protocol for top-down LC-MS/MS of human lung tissue
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8trjo","text":"Overview description of the process for acquiring top-down LC-MS/MS data on human lung tissue","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Lung tissue was provided by University of Rochester Medical Center. Tissue was collected and prepared according to the following: 615.1 URMC HTC Non-Inflated Fresh-Frozen Embedded Lung and Associated Tissue by Gloria S Pryhuber
Perform LC based Proteomics on adjacent tissue sections: Tissue Homogenization and GELFrEE for Top-Down Proteomics by Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
Untargeted Top-down Proteomics by LC-MS/MS on Eclipse by Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
Top-down proteomics data analysis on the NRTDP TDPortal by Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
creator: Kelleher KRG KRG Research Group
